henon.notes: Degree-2 map; no closed form. Session 51.

arnold_cat.notes: Linear part EML-1, mod is EML-inf. Session 48.

rossler.name: rossler
rossler.eml_depth_horizon_n: O(n) — RK4 iteration, depth 2 per step
rossler.insight: Rössler RHS: (-y-z, x+a*y, b+z*(x-c)). Highest degree term is z*x = product of two state variables. Product of two EML-1 expressions = EML-2. Same class as Lorenz (also degree-2 polynomial RHS).

chua.name: chua_circuit
chua.insight: Chua diode uses |x±1| — absolute value is not real-analytic at kinks. By the Identity Theorem, no finite EML tree can represent f(x). The chaos mechanism is the kink at x=±1, not smooth sensitivity. Same EML class as tent map: piecewise-linear chaos.

double_pendulum.name: double_pendulum
double_pendulum.eml_depth_horizon_n: O(n) — per step depth 4 via RK4
double_pendulum.why_depth_4: sin(θ), cos(θ) are depth 3 each. Product sin(θ1)*cos(θ2) is depth 4. Quotient adds log/exp: depth 5-6. But all functions are real-analytic → EML-finite.
double_pendulum.insight: Double pendulum chaos is smooth — the equations of motion involve sin/cos (depth-3 EML) multiplied together (depth-4). No kinks or absolute values. Despite wild sensitivity to initial conditions, the EML class is 1 (smooth), not 2 (piecewise).

henon.name: henon_map
henon.eml_depth_horizon_n: O(n) — degree-2 map iterated n times, degree grows as 2^n
henon.closed_form: None (polynomial composition has no simple closed form)
henon.insight: (x,y) -> (1 - a*x² + y, b*x). Highest degree: x². Like logistic map: degree-2 per step, EML-2 per step. No closed form but smooth → Class 1. Hénon attractor is fractal but the MAP is EML-2.

duffing.name: duffing
duffing.forcing: gamma*cos(omega*t) — depth 3, parallel to polynomial part
duffing.insight: Duffing: dy/dt = x - x³ - delta*y + gamma*cos(omega*t). x³ is depth 2 (two multiplies). cos is depth 3. The RHS has depth 3 overall (max of parallel branches). Forced oscillator chaos: smooth sensitivity, Class 1.

findings.name: Rössler is Class 1 (EML-2 per step)
findings.content: Single bilinear term z*x gives degree-2 RHS, same as Lorenz.

findings.name: Chua Circuit is Class 2 (EML-inf)
findings.content: Piecewise-linear diode f(x) uses |x±1|. Non-analytic. Same class as tent map.

findings.name: Double Pendulum is Class 1 (EML-4 per step)
findings.content: Trig products (depth 4) but fully analytic. Class 1 despite depth 4.

findings.name: Hénon/Duffing both Class 1 (EML-2)
findings.content: Polynomial systems. Degree-2/3 → EML-2. No closed forms.

findings.name: EML class = chaos mechanism class
findings.content: Smooth chaos (exp sensitivity) ↔ EML-finite. Kink-based chaos (symbolic dynamics) ↔ EML-inf. The partition is exact and mechanistic.

next_session.title: Fractals — EML Complexity of Fractal Geometry
priorities: Koch snowflake: piecewise self-similar → EML-inf at limit, EML-2 per iteration
Sierpinski triangle: IFS — EML-2 per affine step
Mandelbrot set: z -> z² + c (EML-2 per iterate), membership = limit set
Julia sets: same map as Mandelbrot, different parameter
IFS attractor general theory: affine maps are EML-1; attractors are EML-inf limits
